mnemonics.title: LIFO
mnemonics.content: Last In, First Out - Like stacking plates in cafeteria

mnemonics.title: FIFO
mnemonics.content: First In, First Out - Movie ticket queue system

visualTips.visualization: Vertical Pringles can - only top chip accessible
Ring buffer with head/tail pointers chasing each other

analogies.analogy: Subway car with doors at both ends - people enter/exit either side
Hospital ER - most critical patients treated first
